title: Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle Proposal - Week Of 2026-03-16
post1Raw:
On behalf of @atlas-axis, we are submitting the Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle proposal below.

* * *

This proposal includes the following edits:

- **Authorize Funding For Genesis Agents** - Authorizes a total of 70,000,000 USDS of funding to Amatsu, Ozone, Keel, and Launch Agent 6.
- **Add Launch Agent 6 And Launch Agent 7 Allocator Vault Parameters** - Adds the Allocator Vault contracts and related parameters for Launch Agent 6 and Launch Agent 7.
- **Authorize Investments In ACRDX On Ethereum Mainnet** - Authorizes investments in ACRDX on Ethereum Mainnet subject to exposure limits and a requirement to reduce this exposure to zero over time.
- **Add Allocation System Instances To Grove Artifact** - Adds new Centrifuge and Morpho Instances to the Grove Artifact.
- **Update Multisig Operators From Ozone And Amatsu To Soter Labs** - Updates references to multisig operators from Ozone and Amatsu to Soter Labs.

---

### Authorize Funding For Genesis Agents

- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.2.8.2 - Active Ecosystem Accords`. These documents should be located directly after `A.2.8.2.7 - Ecosystem Accord 7: Sky and Skybase` and its subdocuments to read as follows:
    - **Ecosystem Accord 8: Sky And Amatsu** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein record the terms of agreement between Sky and Amatsu as agreed in Ecosystem Accord 8.
        - **Accord Key Details** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the key details of Ecosystem Accord 8, such as parties to the agreement and the duration of the Accord.
            - **Parties To The Accord** *(Core)* - The parties to Ecosystem Accord 8 are Sky and Amatsu, as defined in the subdocuments herein.
                - **Sky Details** *(Core)* - The party â€˜Skyâ€™ comprises Sky Core.
                - **Amatsu Details** *(Core)* - The party â€˜Amatsuâ€™ comprises the Amatsu Executor Agent.
            - **Duration Of The Accord** *(Core)* - The duration of Ecosystem Accord 8 is indefinite, commencing from March 19, 2026.
        - **Accord Substantive Terms** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 8. Additional detail regarding the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 8 will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas, as agreed by the Parties to the Accord.
            - **Genesis Capital Allocation** *(Core)* - The Genesis Capital Allocation for Amatsu is 25,000,000 USDS. The transfer of the Genesis Capital Allocation to Amatsu will be included in the March 26, 2026 Executive Vote. This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
                - **Amatsu SubProxy Address** *(Core)* - The address of Amatsuâ€™s SubProxy Account will be specified in the Technical Scope Forum Post for the deployment of the SubProxy Account.
                - **Use Of Genesis Capital** *(Core)* - The Genesis Capital Allocation will be used to support Amatsuâ€™s work in delivering services in the role of Operational Executor Agent for the Sky Ecosystem.
    - **Ecosystem Accord 9: Sky And Ozone** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein record the terms of agreement between Sky and Ozone as agreed in Ecosystem Accord 9.
        - **Accord Key Details** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the key details of Ecosystem Accord 9, such as parties to the agreement and the duration of the Accord.
            - **Parties To The Accord** *(Core)* - The parties to Ecosystem Accord 9 are Sky and Ozone, as defined in the subdocuments herein.
                - **Sky Details** *(Core)* - The party â€˜Skyâ€™ comprises Sky Core.
                - **Ozone Details** *(Core)* - The party â€˜Ozoneâ€™ comprises the Ozone Executor Agent.
            - **Duration Of The Accord** *(Core)* - The duration of Ecosystem Accord 9 is indefinite, commencing from March 19, 2026.
        - **Accord Substantive Terms** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 9. Additional detail regarding the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 9 will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas, as agreed by the Parties to the Accord.
            - **Genesis Capital Allocation** *(Core)* - The Genesis Capital Allocation for Ozone is 25,000,000 USDS. The transfer of the Genesis Capital Allocation to Ozone will be included in the March 26, 2026 Executive Vote. This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
                - **Ozone SubProxy Address** *(Core)* - The address of Ozoneâ€™s SubProxy Account will be specified in the Technical Scope Forum Post for the deployment of the SubProxy Account.
                - **Use Of Genesis Capital** *(Core)* - The Genesis Capital Allocation will be used to fund Ozoneâ€™s work in supporting the Agents that it serves as the Operational Executor Agent for.
- **Replace** `A.2.8.2.6.2.2.2.2 - Transfer Of Genesis Capital Allocation To Launch Agent 6 SubProxy` to read as follows:
    - **Transfer Of Genesis Capital Allocation To Launch Agent 6 SubProxy** *(Core)* - The transfer of 10,000,000 USDS from the Surplus Buffer to the Launch Agent 6 SubProxy for the Genesis Capital Allocation will be included in the March 26, 2026 Executive Vote. This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll. The address of Launch Agent 6â€™s SubProxy account is `0x24fdcd3bFA5C2553e05B2f9AD0365EBC296278D3`.
- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.2.8.2.3.2 - Accord Substantive Terms`. These documents should be located directly after `A.2.8.2.3.2.3 - Keel Senior Risk Capital` to read as follows:
    - **Tokenomics** *(Core)* - The tokenomics for Keel will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.
    - **Genesis Capital Allocation** *(Core)* - The Genesis Capital Allocation for Keel is 10,000,000 USDS. The transfer of the Genesis Capital Allocation to Keel will be included in the March 26, 2026 Executive Vote. This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll. The address of Keelâ€™s SubProxy account is specified in [A.6.1.1.3.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.3.2.1.1.3.1.1.2).
- **Replace** `A.3.7.1.6.5 - Genesis Agents` to read as follows:
    - **Genesis Agents** *(Core)* - Genesis Agents are Agents that receive capital contributions from Sky, including, without limitation:
        - Spark
        - Grove
        - Keel
        - Skybase
        - Obex
        - Launch Agent 6
        - Core Council Executor Agent 1
        - Amatsu
        - Ozone
- **Replace** `A.3.7.1.6.6.1 - Amount Of Capital Contributed By Sky To Agents` to read as follows:
    - **Amount Of Capital Contributed By Sky To Agents** *(Core)* - The amount of capital contributed by Sky to Agents is:
        - Spark - 25,000,000 USDS
        - Obex - 21,000,000 USDS
        - Skybase - 15,000,000 USDS
        - Core Council Executor Agent 1 - 25,000,000 USDS
        - Keel - 10,000,000 USDS
        - Launch Agent 6 - 10,500,000 USDS
        - Amatsu - 25,000,000 USDS
        - Ozone - 25,000,000 USDS

### **Add Launch Agent 6 And Launch Agent 7 Allocator Vault Parameters**

- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.7.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account` to read as follows:
    - **SubProxy Account** *(Core)* - The address of Launch Agent 6's SubProxy Account on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0x24fdcd3bFA5C2553e05B2f9AD0365EBC296278D3`.
- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.6.1.1.7.2.1.1.3.1.1 - Parameters`. These documents should be located directly after `A.6.1.1.7.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account` and before `A.6.1.1.7.2.1.1.3.1.1.3 - Genesis Account` to read as follows:

        - **StarGuard Max Delay** *(Core)* - The Launch Agent 6 StarGuard `maxDelay` is seven (7) days.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.7.2.6.1.2 - Multi-Instance Coordinator Document` to read as follows:
    - **Multi-Instance Coordinator Document** *(Core)* - The documents herein provide general specifications of the Launch Agent 6 Liquidity Layer and define Launch Agent 6's overarching strategy and operational framework for managing across all Instances.

            - **Launch Agent 6 Liquidity Layer Architecture** *(Core)* - The documents herein describe the high-level design of the Launch Agent 6 Liquidity Layer, including its key smart contracts and their functionality.
                - **Launch Agent 6 Liquidity Layer Addresses** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein provide the addresses of the Launch Agent 6 Liquidity Layerâ€™s constituent contracts.
                    - **Allocator Contract Addresses** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain global key addresses for the Allocator Contracts.
                        - **Ethereum Mainnet** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain the Allocator Contract Addresses on the Ethereum Mainnet.
                            - **Allocator Buffer Contract** *(Core)* - The address of the ALLOCATOR_BUFFER contract is: `0xD0BB61b34771146e31055f20f329cDf97429F889`.
                            - **Allocator Vault Contract** *(Core)* - The address of the ALLOCATOR_VAULT (ALLOCATOR-PRYSM-A) contract is: `0x146181Aa9B362EaEC2eC3aDd7429a06D53B43d1a`.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.8.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account` to read as follows:
    - **SubProxy Account** *(Core)* - The address of Launch Agent 7's SubProxy Account on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0x56a9bA5FE133EF4Ab1131E8ac7c4312a52284f5B`.
- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.6.1.1.8.2.1.1.3.1.1 - Parameters`. These documents should be located directly after `A.6.1.1.8.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account` and before `A.6.1.1.8.2.1.1.3.1.1.3 - Genesis Account` to read as follows:
    - **StarGuard Contract** *(Core)* - The address of Launch Agent 7's StarGuard contract on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0xB36e88c02E4619Ef34C0Db76C5BCb6655747FB28`.
        - **StarGuard Max Delay** *(Core)* - The Launch Agent 7 StarGuard `maxDelay` is seven (7) days.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.8.2.6.1.2 - Multi-Instance Coordinator Document` to read as follows:
    - **Multi-Instance Coordinator Document** *(Core)* - The documents herein provide general specifications of the Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layer and define Launch Agent 7's overarching strategy and operational framework for managing across all Instances.
        - **General Specifications** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain general specifications for the Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layer.
            - **Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layer Architecture** *(Core)* - The documents herein describe the high-level design of the Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layer, including its key smart contracts and their functionality.
                - **Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layer Addresses** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein provide the addresses of the Launch Agent 7 Liquidity Layerâ€™s constituent contracts.
                    - **Allocator Contract Addresses** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain global key addresses for the Allocator Contracts.
                        - **Ethereum Mainnet** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain the Allocator Contract Addresses on the Ethereum Mainnet.
                            - **Allocator Buffer Contract** *(Core)* - The address of the ALLOCATOR_BUFFER contract is: `0x67Ac5c8FbFDAc5265c995e9B2ACd830496438AfD`.
                            - **Allocator Vault Contract** *(Core)* - The address of the ALLOCATOR_VAULT (ALLOCATOR-INTERVAL-A) contract is: `0xDD3bE7650589E6A6171d454b026C4AD1a2C02720`.

### Authorize Investments In ACRDX On Ethereum Mainnet

- **Replace** `A.3.2.2.1.1.1.5.3.1 - Instance Financial CRRs For Specific Assets` to read as follows:
    - **Instance Financial CRRs For Specific Assets** *(Core)* - The following Instance Financial CRRs apply to specific assets listed:
        - BUIDL, JTRSY on Ethereum Mainnet, and USTB - 0% Instance Financial CRR
        - JTRSY on Avalanche - 0.5% Instance Financial CRR
        - JAAA on Ethereum Mainnet - 1.6% Instance Financial CRR
        - JAAA on Avalanche - 2.1% Instance Financial CRR
        - STAC on Ethereum Mainnet - 1.6% Instance Financial CRR
        - GACLO-1 on Ethereum Mainnet - 0.85% Instance Financial CRR
        - ACRDX on Plume - 9.99% Instance Financial CRR
        - ACRDX on Ethereum Mainnet - 9.99% Instance Financial CRR
- **Add** a new subdocument of `A.3.2.2.1.1.1.5.3.1 - Instance Financial CRRs For Specific Assets`. This document should be located directly after `A.3.2.2.1.1.1.5.3.1.1 - Additional Restrictions On Investments In JTRSY And JAAA On Avalanche` to read as follows:
    - **Additional Restrictions On Investments In ACRDX On Plume And Ethereum Mainnet** *(Core)* - Total ACRDX exposure may not increase beyond 50.97 million USDS and should be reduced to zero over time.

                - **Network** *(Core)* - Ethereum Mainnet
                - **Target Protocol** *(Core)* - Centrifuge ACRDX
                - **Asset Supplied By Grove Liquidity Layer** *(Core)* - USDC
                - **Token** *(Core)* - ACRDX
            - **Contract Addresses** *(Core)* - The documents herein define the Instance contract addresses.
                - **Token Address** *(Core)* - `0x9477724Bb54AD5417de8Baff29e59DF3fB4DA74f`
                - **Deposit Address (Mainnet)** *(Core)* - `0x74a739ea1dc67c5a0179ebad665d1d3c4b80b712`
                - **Underlying Asset Address** *(Core)* - `0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48`
            - **Rate Limit IDs** *(Core)* - The specific `RateLimitID`(s) for this conduitâ€™s inflow and outflow are defined in the subdocuments herein.

                - **Outflow RateLimitID** *(Core)* - The outflow RateLimitID is: `0x58aa7b39a6c9894ea4a4cd6868d014c718d09913cdf5d793e21509f0ccd32495`
            - **Rate Limits** *(Core)* - The current `maxAmount` and `slope` for this conduitâ€™s inflow/outflow are defined in the subdocuments herein.
                - **Deposit Rate Limits** *(Core)* - The deposit rate limits are:
                    - `maxAmount`: 20,000,000 USDC
                    - `slope`: 20,000,000 USDC per day
                - **Withdrawal Rate Limits** *(Core)* - The withdrawal rate limits are:
                    - `maxAmount`: Unlimited
            - **Off-chain Operational Parameters** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain specific off-chain parameters for this Instance.
                - **Maximum Exposure** *(Core)* - Total ACRDX exposure may not exceed 50.97 million USDS and should be reduced to zero over time.
        - **Instance-specific Operational Processes** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain operational procedures or monitoring requirements unique to this Instance that deviate from or otherwise supplement the general Grove Liquidity Layer processes.
- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.3.1.7 - Morpho`. These documents should be located directly after `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.3.1.7.5 - Ethereum Mainnet - Grove x Steakhouse AUSD Morpho Vault V2 Instance Configuration Document` and its subdocuments to read as follows:

                    - `slope`: 50,000,000 RLUSD per day
                - **Withdrawal Rate Limits** *(Core)* - The withdrawal rate limits are:

            - **Off-chain Operational Parameters** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain specific off-chain parameters for this Instance.
                - **Maximum Exposure** *(Core)* - The Maximum Exposure for this Instance is 0 USD.
        - **Instance-specific Operational Processes** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain operational procedures or monitoring requirements unique to this Instance that deviate from or otherwise supplement the general Grove Liquidity Layer processes.

### **Update Multisig Operators From Ozone And Amatsu To Soter Labs**

- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.3.3 - Core Operator Relayer Multisig` to read as follows:
    - **Core Operator Relayer Multisig** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig holds a [A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.2.2.1.1.2 - Relayer Role](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.2.2.1.1.2) and is controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.3.3.4 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig are three (3) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.3.3.6 - Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs can change the signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig at any time, so long as there are at least three (3) signers and at least two thirds of signers are required to execute transactions.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2 - Core Operator Relayer Multisig` to read as follows:
    - **Core Operator Relayer Multisig** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig has the RELAYER_ROLE as defined in [A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.1.2 - Relayer Role](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.1.2) and is controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.3.4.4 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Freezer Multisig are two (2) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs, two (2) addresses controlled by Operational Facilitator Endgame Edge, and one (1) address controlled by Keel.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.5.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2 - Core Operator Relayer Multisig` to read as follows:
    - **Core Operator Relayer Multisig** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig has the `RELAYER_ROLE` as defined in [A.6.1.1.5.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2 - Relayer Role](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.5.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2) and is controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.5.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig are three (3) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.5.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.5 - Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs can change the signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig at any time, so long as there are at least three (3) signers and at least two thirds of signers are required to execute transactions.
